records.m_Talk_ENG: It's strange. I felt so uncertain when I first arrived here, but...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe it's because everyone has helped me out, including you, Boss?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I won't say I don't want to return to Orario, but... right now, I really value the time I've spent with all of you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sure you feel the same way, seeing how you're offering this to me, Boss.

records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sure you feel the same way, seeing how you're offering this to me, Boss.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I understand. I've also come to realize how important my companions are too, after everything I've been through as an Adventurer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When I lost to a monster... I was furious. If I was alone, I don't think I would've been able to get back up again.

records.m_Talk_DEU: When I lost to a monster... I was furious. If I was alone, I don't think I would've been able to get back up again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But because I had people around me, and the Goddess, I was able to get back on my feet.

records.m_Talk_DEU: But because I had people around me, and the Goddess, I was able to get back on my feet.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But because I had people around me, and the Goddess, I was able to get back on my feet.

records.m_Talk_DEU: If I can be that kind of person to you, I'll lend you my strength, Boss.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I can be that kind of person to you, I'll lend you my strength, Boss.

records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sure you have your own reasons for fighting.
